ksa_text: Knowledge of data domain ownership and stewardship models, including domain boundary definition, accountability assignment, and cross-domain governance dispute resolution.

Knowledge of data administration and data standardization policies and standards.
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Governance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.445) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Science. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.445 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with Data Governance. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. Data Governance is not sufficiently central to the VP Data Science to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Science roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Governance is not a standard competency expectation for VP Data Science. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP Data Science competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.445) and edge-domain placement (Data Governance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP Data Science. All passes support exclusion.
